name: Diane
lore: Serpent Sin of Envy. A giant commanding the earth itself. Collab unit.

skills.description: Does Rupture ATK-scaled damage to all enemies. Rupture deals 2x damage against buffed enemies.
Does ATK-scaled damage to one enemy. At rank 2 or higher, seals the target's attack skills (ultimates and damaging debuff skills are unaffected).

ultimate.description: Does 600% Rupture ATK-scaled damage to all enemies. Rupture deals 2x damage against buffed enemies.

passive.name: Giant's Will
passive.description: ATK rises by 15% of base for each turn passed (max 5 stacks, uncancellable). Teammates tagged [Giant] gain +5% all stats in battle.
